articles.author: Tariq Malik
articles.title: NASA's Artemis 2 astronauts are cruising to the moon. So why are they doing CPR tests today? - Space
articles.description: After an action-packed first two days, Flight Day 3 may bring a more relaxed pace for the Artemis 2 moon astronauts.

articles.author: Gwen Howerton
articles.title: NASA engineers in Houston fix crappy situation for astronauts - Chron
articles.description: Not long after launch, Artemis II mission specialist Christina Koch reported a problem with Integrity's toilet. Houston was there to help.
articles.content: Houston plays a vital role in spaceflight. We don't launch the rockets, but the intrepid scientists at the Johnson Space Center here in Space City monitor spaceflights and troubleshoot problems that … [+5900 chars]

articles.title: April full moon 2026 dazzles as 'Pink Moon' lights up skies worldwide (photos) - Space
articles.description: "we have a beautiful moon rise, we're headed right at it."
